annotations.title: Glow Up MD: Angie Kim, MD

content.text:
Radiofrequency (RF) microneedling is a minimally invasive cosmetic procedure that combines traditional microneedling with radiofrequency energy to stimulate collagen production, resulting in firmer, smoother, and more youthful-looking skin. This treatment is effective for addressing various skin concerns, including fine lines, wrinkles, acne scars, and uneven skin texture.

In Katy, Texas, several reputable clinics offer RF microneedling services:

**[Ageless Med Spa](https://www.agelessmedspakaty.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical spa · 4.5 (117 reviews)**  
_414 W Grand Pkwy S #115, Katy, TX 77494_  
Offers RF microneedling to improve skin texture, tone, and elasticity, reducing fine lines, wrinkles, and acne scars. Known for experienced practitioners and a personalized approach.

**[Glow Up MD: Angie Kim, MD](https://www.glowupmdspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Skin care clinic · 5.0 (40 reviews)**  
_1227 Grand W Blvd B210, Katy, TX 77449_  
Provides RF microneedling treatments targeting acne scars, fine lines, and hyperpigmentation, with a focus on minimal downtime and maximum results.

**[H-Town Aesthetics](https://htownaesthetics.com/?utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=gbp&utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical spa · 5.0 (128 reviews)**  
_21003 Highland Knolls Dr Ste.300, Katy, TX 77450_  
Specializes in Secret RF Microneedling, combining microneedling with RF energy to enhance skin tone, texture, and firmness, suitable for all skin types.

**[Lush RX Med Spa](https://www.lushrx.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical spa · 5.0 (71 reviews)**  
_4914 Bissonnet St Ste 100, Bellaire, TX 77401_  
Offers RF microneedling to stimulate collagen production, improving skin texture and reducing signs of aging, with personalized care tailored to individual needs.

**[Aesthetic Master Infusions LLC](http://aestheticmasterinfusions.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical spa · 5.0 (51 reviews)**  
_5231 E 5th St, Katy, TX 77493_  
Offers RF microneedling to boost collagen and elastin production, smoothing fine lines and wrinkles with minimal downtime.

When considering RF microneedling, it's essential to consult with a qualified practitioner to determine the most appropriate treatment plan for your skin type and concerns. Each of these clinics offers personalized consultations to help you achieve your aesthetic goals.
